mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO strategy_rule_detail (strategy_no, detail_no, rule_type, priority, version, is_delete, create_at, update_at) VALUES
( #{item.strategyNo}, #{item.detailNo}, #{item.ruleType}, #{item.priority}, #{item.version}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.createAt}, #{item.updateAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT strategy_no, detail_no, rule_type, priority, version FROM strategy_rule_detail WHERE strategy_no = #{strategyNo} ORDER BY priority ASC
